title: Irish Skillet Dinner
description: A hearty, savory meal featuring Irish-style sausages and fresh tomatoes.

ingredients.name: Irish sausages
ingredients.notes: look for Irish-style sausages at a butcher or high-end grocery store

ingredients.name: plum tomatoes
ingredients.notes: halve or quarter depending on size

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the Irish sausages to the skillet, browning on all sides, about 5-7 minutes total.
Add the plum tomatoes to the skillet, stirring to combine with the sausages and onion mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, allowing the flavors to meld together, about 10-12 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
